name: io.github.mwaxman1/x-trend-intelligence
description: MCP server exposing 8 social intelligence tools for X/Twitter — competitor sentiment, brand monitoring, trend detection, share-of-voice, complaint identification, keyword tracking, influencer analysis, and combined intelligence reports. Deterministic sentiment scoring, no LLM dependency.
title: X-Trend Intelligence

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: X API bearer token. Get one at https://developer.x.com

tools.name: analyze_competitor_sentiment
tools.description: Search recent X posts mentioning a competitor and score sentiment using a deterministic keyword lexicon. Returns sentiment score (-1 to +1), percentages, and top posts.

tools.name: track_brand_mentions
tools.description: Track brand mention volume and engagement over time on X. Returns daily counts, trend direction, and top posts by engagement.

tools.name: detect_trending_topics
tools.description: Get X/Twitter trending topics for a location and cross-reference with post volume to identify rising trends.

tools.name: compare_share_of_voice
tools.description: Compare mention counts and engagement for 2-5 competitors. Returns share-of-voice percentages and sentiment for each.

tools.name: identify_complaints
tools.description: Search for X posts mentioning a brand alongside negative keywords. Returns categorized complaints with engagement and links.

tools.name: monitor_keyword_frequency
tools.description: Track keyword appearance frequency in X posts over time. Returns daily counts, peak day, related hashtags, and sample posts.

tools.name: analyze_influencer_reach
tools.description: Analyze an X user's profile, engagement rates, top performing content, and estimated reach.

tools.name: export_intelligence_report
tools.description: Generate a combined markdown intelligence report with brand mentions, competitor sentiment, share of voice, and complaints.

marketplace.name: X-Trend Intelligence
marketplace.tagline: Ask your AI agent what the world thinks about your competitors.
marketplace.shortDescription: MCP server exposing 8 social intelligence tools for X/Twitter — competitor sentiment, brand monitoring, trend detection, and share-of-voice.
marketplace.privacy: Stateless serverless. No data stored, logged, or tracked. User's X API token used per-request only.
